failures.description: The agent omitted a qualifying product from the tool results: item_id 5312063289 had price 195.15, which is more than 194.56, but the final answer listed only three qualifying item_ids.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify available Skateboards with deck material=bamboo costing more than $194.56. The ProductCatalogSearch output at index 3 contained all required evidence. Four returned items satisfy the price condition: 4293355847 ($200.80), 5312063289 ($195.15), 6956751343 ($217.06), and 8176740019 ($208.60). At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer from that tool output but omitted item_id 5312063289, even though its price is greater than $194.56. This reflects incorrect reasoning over the tool result / considering only part of the output. The later Evaluator did not correct the omission.
